env._NOTE_1_DATABASE: Default DB: context-index__llama-cpp__unsloth-embeddinggemma-300m-gguf__768__q8.sqlite (auto-derived from provider+model+dim+dtype; hf-local ONNX q8 is the fallback).
env._NOTE_2_PROVIDERS: Auto cascade: VOYAGE_API_KEY -> OPENAI_API_KEY -> llama-cpp (GGUF Q8_0 + Metal) -> hf-local (ONNX q8 fallback).
env._NOTE_3_EMBEDDINGS_PROVIDER: Auto cascade: VOYAGE_API_KEY -> OPENAI_API_KEY -> llama-cpp (when GGUF runtime installed) -> hf-local. Set EMBEDDINGS_PROVIDER=<provider> to force a specific provider.
env._NOTE_4_CLOUD_PROVIDERS: For cloud: add VOYAGE_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY; Voyage uses rerank-2.5 and auto-selects the matching DB profile
env._NOTE_7_FEATURE_FLAGS: Opt-out flags (default ON): SPECKIT_ADAPTIVE_FUSION, SPECKIT_SESSION_BOOST, SPECKIT_CAUSAL_BOOST, SPECKIT_HYDE_ACTIVE, SPECKIT_ENTITY_LINKING, SPECKIT_GRAPH_CONCEPT_ROUTING, SPECKIT_GRAPH_REFRESH_MODE=write_local. Tier 3 LLM save routing is always on (fail-open to Tier 2 on timeout).
env._NOTE_AUTO_MIGRATION: Auto-migration: hf-local sqlite + llama-cpp active -> daemon re-embeds + deletes source. Opt out: MEMORY_AUTO_MIGRATE_HF_TO_LLAMA=false.

env._NOTE_1_OWNERSHIP: Standalone MCP server for skill-advisor subsystem (extracted from mk-spec-memory per 013/009 ADR-001).
env._NOTE_2_DB: Database lives at .opencode/skills/system-skill-advisor/mcp_server/database/skill-graph.sqlite by default; MK_SKILL_ADVISOR_DB_DIR overrides, with SYSTEM_SKILL_ADVISOR_DB_DIR as a legacy fallback.
env._NOTE_3_TOOLS: Registers 8 tools: advisor_recommend/rebuild/status/validate plus skill_graph_scan/query/status/validate. MCP namespace: mcp__mk_skill_advisor__*

env._NOTE_1_OWNERSHIP: Standalone MCP server for code-graph subsystem (extracted from system-spec-kit per ADR-002 in packet 014/007-mcp-topology-pivot).
env._NOTE_2_DB: Database lives at .opencode/skills/system-code-graph/mcp_server/database/code-graph.sqlite by default; SPECKIT_CODE_GRAPH_DB_DIR overrides.
env._NOTE_3_TOOLS: Registers 10 tools: code_graph_scan/query/context/status/verify/apply, detect_changes, ccc_status/reindex/feedback. MCP namespace: mcp__mk_code_index__*
env._NOTE_4_INDEX_DEFAULTS: INDEX_* committed defaults are false (end-user safe). Maintainer mode: set SPECKIT_CODE_GRAPH_MAINTAINER_MODE=true in .env.local (gitignored); the launcher will force all 5 INDEX_* to true at startup. Per-call code_graph_scan args (includeSkills, includeAgents, includeCommands, includeSpecs, includePlugins) still override env for fine-grained control.

env._NOTE_2: Default embedding: google/embeddinggemma-300m (sentence-transformers, ~620MB, no API key)
